case_title: GARELLA, RICHARD C. VS HERTZBERG, STEVEN et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY GARELLA, RICHARD C. AS TO DEFENDANT HERTZBERG, STEVEN CIF OF THE SAN FRANCISCO FOUNDATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-28-2006 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION FEB-28-2006, CONTINUED BY COURT TO MAR-15-2006 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 ORDER GRANTED. (NOTE NEW HEARING TIME)
DEFT REQUEST FOR POSTPONEMENT OF HRG. ORDER TO BE SIGNED BY COMMISSIONER. $10.00 FEE PAID.
CORRESPONDENCE RECEIVED FROM RICHARD GARELLA -FURTHER EXPLANATION OF CASE CC: HERTZBERG.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CIF OF THE SAN FRANCISCO FOUNDATION
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF HEARING SENT TO RICHARD C. GARELLA RETURNED TO COURT INSUFFICIENT ADDRESS.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GARELLA, RICHARD C. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CIF OF THE SAN FRANCISCO FOUNDATION THE MATTER IS OFF CALENDARED AS TO DEFENDANT HERTZBERG, STEVEN; PLAINTIFF TO RE-SET AND SERVE DEFENDANT HERTZBERG, STEVEN. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
